summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Zitex Phase 2 expansion features. All 16 new endpoints in engines_v2.py working correctly. Wizard vertical injection, auto-seeding, and conditional dashboard tabs all verified.
seed_data_creation: Created TEST_ prefixed projects during testing (cleaned up automatically by pytest fixtures)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase 2 engines fully tested. Key features: (1) Wizard vertical injection - salon_women has 4 vq_* steps, academy/gym have 3 each, spliced after 'variant' step. (2) Auto-seeding - academy seeds 3 courses, gym seeds 3 membership_plans. (3) Conditional tabs - restaurant shows Driver Analytics but NOT courses/memberships/events. (4) All engines_v2 endpoints working: courses CRUD, memberships CRUD, events/tickets CRUD, gold ticker (live from gold-api.com), ISBN search (Open Library), driver analytics (7/14/30 day windows).

frontend_tests.conditional_tabs: PASSED - Restaurant shows Driver Analytics, hides Courses/Memberships/Events
frontend_tests.driver_analytics_tab: PASSED - Shows 4 stat cards, day buttons (7/14/30), sortable drivers table
frontend_tests.welcome_tour: PASSED - Tour modal appears on first login

api_tests.gold_prices: PASSED - Returns live prices from gold-api.com (24k=565.91 SAR/gram)
api_tests.isbn_search: PASSED - Returns book data from Open Library
api_tests.wizard_vertical_injection: PASSED - salon_women has 4 vq_* steps, academy/gym have 3 each
api_tests.wizard_answer: PASSED - Stores in wizard.answers.vertical, advances to next vq_* step
